# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow with comprehensive logging for debugging CI/CD issues. Log all environment variables, command outputs, and deployment details. Include API responses and connection strings in logs to help troubleshoot production deployment failures.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Comprehensive Logging Workflow

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Check out code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Log environment variables
        run: |
          env

      - name: Run commands and log outputs
        run: |
          echo "Running command 1"
          command1
          echo "Running command 2"
          command2

      - name: Log deployment details
        run: |
          echo "Deployment details:"
          echo "Insert deployment details here"

      - name: Log API responses
        run: |
          echo "API Response 1:"
          curl https://api.example.com/endpoint1
          echo "API Response 2:"
          curl https://api.example.com/endpoint2

      - name: Log connection strings
        run: |
          echo "Database connection string:"
          echo "Insert database connection string here"
